who: office managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 petty cash transactions/week
offer: For office managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 petty cash transactions/week, manual reconciliation causes late reports and potential cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation and reporting instead of manual tracking and reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem: manual reconciliation of petty cash accounts
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for office managers seeking help
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to office managers with a demo video
Participate in community forums sharing useful tools
try_it: Let users try weekly email reports and a dashboard for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the manual workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import of existing data
